body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
--> Uses a single script to run any FLUXNET site experiment and simplifies the process of adding a new FLUXNET site to run on. For each new site, we now just need to add a parameters file with all site specific variable values and a link to download the data from somewhere as a CSV.


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->
- [x] Implement the bug fix from #366
- [x] Include some data validation code, i.e check the necessary columns are included in the given data file
- [x] Fix bug in Harvard site?
- [x] For data used only for initial conditions/plotting, use more general values if data absent
- [x] For comparison plots - only plot comparison if data quality flag not "missing"
- [x] Add Vaira Ranch Site (with this PR, just add parameters!)

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
- Removes the old Ozark experiment
- Creates one script, `run_fluxnet_jl` which can be run on any FLUXNET site
- For each site which we want to run the model on, creates a directory named with the site ID, and a parameters file for each site ID needed
- Abstracts the plotting utility functions and data utility functions to new files
- Does all data comparison based on interpolation to fix previous bugs


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Overhaul Experiments Script
